description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular metal toolbox with a hinged black plastic lid that opens upward, revealing a spacious interior. The exterior is primarily metallic silver with reinforced black plastic edges and corners for durability. Inside, the toolbox contains several hand tools, including a cordless power drill, a hammer, and a wrench, all neatly arranged. The lid features a molded grid pattern and a set of green latches or clips, possibly for securing small items or accessories. The front of the toolbox has two robust metal latches for secure closure, and a green plastic handle is mounted on the back for carrying. The overall design suggests it is built for heavy-duty use in urban or construction environments.
description: A sturdy metal toolbox with a black plastic lid, green handle, and metal latches, containing various hand tools inside. The box is reinforced for durability and designed for practical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open lid, interior tools, metal latches, and the main compartment layout.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the arrangement of tools inside and the robust construction of the box.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the green plastic handle and the plain metallic back surface.
description_view_3: Angled rear-left view showing the handle and a partial glimpse of the tools inside.
attribute_handle_type: Single fixed rectangular plastic handle, green in color, mounted on the back, designed for ergonomic grip and carrying.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two front-facing metal clasp latches, robust and simple, without visible keyholes or combination locks.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Single large main compartment with no visible internal dividers or trays; tools are placed directly inside. The lid has molded sections but no separate trays or bins are visible.
